description: Deterministic vendor candidate scoring contract for V2.

inputs.normalizedVendorAddress: 7768 E LINCOLN WAY APPLE CREEK OH 44606

rules.rejectedWhen: normalized candidate name does not exactly match normalized invoice vendor name
rules.selectedExactWhen: exact name plus exact normalized full address, or exact line1 plus exact city/state/zip
rules.selectedFuzzyWhen: exact name plus exact house number plus exact city/state/zip plus bounded near-match on normalized street core
rules.tieBreakers: after address threshold is met, use exact email, exact phone, then identity completeness
rules.ambiguousWhen: exact name exists but the address threshold is not met strongly enough
